title: Pre-existing: serde(other) Unknown on outbound enum fields
description: Three pre-existing enums use #[serde(other)] Unknown (unit variant, no String payload) but appear in outbound serialized structs. Unknown serializes as the literal 'unknown' string — a wire-invalid value. Affects: ChatKind (ChatQueryInput.filter_kind, ChatPushConfig.kinds), ChatMemberRole (AddMemberInput.role, UpdateMemberRoleInput.role — non-optional, highest risk), OwnerPresence (PresenceStatusPatch.presence). ContactPresence is already guarded. DeliveryState and ChannelPermissionTargetType are inbound-only and safe.
notes: Review converged after 1 round. Final review: jmap-chat-tui-wju9.
